response.justification: Wei Chen substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work at multiple Berlin companies, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. Cloud (AWS CDK), MongoDB, Docker/Kubernetes, and strong testing culture (TDD, trunk-based development, test-framework authorship) map well to the stack. Gaps are moderate: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright mentions, and considerable career time in niche technologies (DLang), but the breadth and craftsmanship focus suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Extensive full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across product companies
Hands-on AI agent development and MCP tooling experience — a rare, explicitly required skill
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill set; Java exposure appears dated
Significant investment in niche ecosystems (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the listed stack

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and Kotlin from primary/secondary stack
